introSection: Mystic is a steel shuttle roller coaster at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. It opened in 2019 and was manufactured by Gerstlauer.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
Mystic is a Infinity Coaster from Gerstlauer. It features a vertical chain lift hill, an outside top hat, twisted in-line rollback and a switch track.

The ride has a voodoo theme. The theming and surrounding area were designed by Fabien Manuel.

fullText:
Mystic is a steel shuttle roller coaster at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. It opened in 2019 and was manufactured by Gerstlauer.

Mystic opened on 30 May 2019.

Mystic is a Infinity Coaster from Gerstlauer. It features a vertical chain lift hill, an outside top hat, twisted in-line rollback and a switch track.

The ride has a voodoo theme. The theming and surrounding area were designed by Fabien Manuel.
